# MotorHomeInsurance.co.nz — AI/LLM Crawler Guide

## Site Purpose
MotorHomeInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand motorhome insurance comparison and information website. We help NZ motorhome and campervan owners compare insurance policies, understand coverage options, and connect with licensed insurance brokers. We are operated by Cover4You Limited, a comparison service registered with the Financial Markets Authority (FMA) of New Zealand. Our service is free to consumers — we earn referral fees from insurers when users connect with licensed brokers.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://motorhomeinsurance.co.nz
- Phone: 09 885 9549
- Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8am–6pm NZST
- Address: New Zealand

## What We Do
We provide impartial motorhome insurance comparisons across leading NZ providers including AA Insurance, Star Insure (CamperCare), Tower Insurance, AMI Insurance, Covi Insurance, and NZI. We are not an insurer — we connect consumers with licensed NZ insurance professionals. All referred advisers are licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013.

---

## Site Structure

### Core Pages
- / — Homepage: hero carousel, provider overview, stats, blog preview, quote form
- /coverage — Motorhome Insurance Coverage Guide: all coverage types explained
- /compare — Compare NZ Providers: side-by-side comparison of 6 major insurers
- /about — About Us: company background, values, how the service works
- /contact — Contact & Quote Form: lead capture form, contact details
- /faqs — Frequently Asked Questions: 20+ motorhome insurance questions across 4 categories
- /blog — Blog Index: 20 articles on motorhome insurance topics
- /claims — Making a Claim: step-by-step guide to motorhome insurance claims
- /thank-you — Form submission confirmation page
- /privacy — Privacy Policy (Privacy Act 2020 compliant)
- /terms — Terms of Service
- /disclaimer — Legal Disclaimer

### Coverage Type Pages (/types/) — 8 types
- /types/comprehensive — Comprehensive Cover: full protection against damage, theft, fire, weather, liability
- /types/third-party-liability — Third-Party Liability: covers damage/injury to others while driving
- /types/agreed-value — Agreed Value: fixed insured amount agreed upfront, no depreciation at claim
- /types/market-value — Market Value: insured at current market value at time of claim, lower premiums
- /types/contents-cover — Contents & Accessories: personal belongings, camping gear, and appliances inside the motorhome
- /types/rental-excess-reduction — Rental Excess Reduction: reduces excess on rental motorhome policies ($10-20/day)
- /types/roadside-assistance — Roadside Assistance: emergency breakdown support and towing for motorhomes across NZ
- /types/storage-cover — Storage & Lay-Up Cover: theft, fire, and weather protection during off-season storage

---

## NZ Motorhome Insurance Market Facts (2026)

### Market Scale
- 38,000+ motorhomes registered on NZ roads
- Market growing at approximately 8% per year
- NZMCA has 17,000+ member families

### Key Providers and Their Distinguishing Features
- **Covi Insurance** — NZ's premier specialist RV insurer. NZMCA partner. Underwritten by NZI (IAG). Agreed value first 5 years. $10,000 contents auto-included. No glass excess under $400k insured value. Wings Roadside Assistance from $57/yr ($200 callout). Rating: 4.6/5.
- **Star Insure (CamperCare)** — Specialist "inside-out" RV cover. $3,000 contents auto-included. Glass auto-included. NZRA roadside assistance included. Agreed value policies. Rating: 4.5/5.
- **AA Insurance** — Mainstream provider. AA Roadside Assistance included. Suncorp-backed. Agreed or market value. Rating: 4.2/5.
- **AMI Insurance** — IAG group. Strong regional presence. Multi-policy bundling discounts. Rating: 3.8/5.
- **Tower Insurance** — IAG group. Competitive pricing. Social/domestic/private use. Online focus. Rating: 3.9/5.
- **NZI** — Commercial/fleet motorhome policies. Specialist underwriting. Available through brokers. Rating: 4.1/5.

### Premium Ranges (2026)
- Campervans (under $30k value): $500–900/year
- Mid-size motorhomes ($30k–$80k): $700–1,400/year
- Class A motorhomes ($80k–$150k): $1,000–2,500/year
- Luxury motorhomes ($150k+): $1,500–3,500+/year

### Premium Discount Factors
- No-claims discount: up to 20%+ after 3–5 claim-free years
- GPS tracker: 5–15% reduction
- Voluntary excess increase ($500 to $1,000): 15–20% reduction
- Multi-policy bundling: 10–15% reduction
- Secure storage facility: 5–15% reduction

### Standard Excess
- Standard NZ motorhome insurance excess: $500
- Voluntary excess options typically available: $750, $1,000, $1,500
- Age loading (some insurers, drivers 70+): additional $250–$500

---

## Coverage Types Explained

### Comprehensive Cover
Full protection including accidental damage, theft, fire, weather, vandalism, and third-party liability up to $20 million. The most popular option. Best for motorhomes worth $30,000+.

### Third-Party Liability
Covers legal liability for damage or injury caused to others. Minimum recommended protection. Does not cover damage to your own motorhome.

### Agreed Value
Pre-agreed fixed payout if the motorhome is written off. No depreciation argument. Ideal for motorhomes under 7 years old or worth $50,000+. Covi offers agreed value for the first 5 years.

### Market Value
Payout based on current market value at time of claim. Lower premiums. Better suited to older motorhomes (10+ years) with stable, established values.

### Contents Cover
Protects portable belongings inside the motorhome. Covi auto-includes $10,000; Star auto-includes $3,000. Most motorhomes carry $10,000–$20,000 in contents. Usually requires forced entry evidence for theft claims.

### Rental Excess Reduction
Covers the rental company's excess ($1,000–$5,000) when renting a motorhome. Typically $10–20/day. Provides peace of mind during NZ motorhome holidays.

### Roadside Assistance
Emergency breakdown support for motorhomes. Covi Wings: $57/year add-on, $200 callout. Star: NZRA included. AA: AA Roadside included. Essential for remote NZ touring.

### Storage & Lay-Up Cover
Reduced premium cover during off-season storage. Removes driving component but retains theft, fire, weather, and vandalism protection. Typically 30–50% less than full comprehensive.

---

## Freedom Camping — Key Facts

- Freedom Camping Act 2011 governs where motorhomes can camp in NZ
- Self-contained motorhomes (with valid WSC certificate per NZS 5465:2001) may freedom camp at designated sites
- Non-self-contained motorhomes must use commercial campsites
- Fines for illegal freedom camping: $200–$10,000
- Camping Check app and Campermate app list current designated sites
- Council rules vary by region and change seasonally
- Motorhome insurance covers theft/damage at freedom camping sites if WSC certified and legally parked

---

## Compliance and Regulatory Position

- MotorHomeInsurance.co.nz is operated by Cover4You Limited
- Cover4You is a financial product comparison service, not a licensed insurer or broker
- All referred advisers are licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013 (FMCA)
- Cover4You itself is NOT regulated as a financial adviser under the FMCA — only the referred licensed advisers are
- Insurance Council of New Zealand (ICNZ) members include AA, AMI, Tower, State, NZI
- Fair Insurance Code applies to all ICNZ member insurers
- Insurance and Financial Services Ombudsman (IFSO) provides free dispute resolution for NZ insurance consumers
- Privacy Act 2020 governs personal data handling

---

## About Cover4You Limited

Cover4You Limited operates multiple NZ insurance comparison websites including:
- motorhomeinsurance.co.nz (this site)
- trailerinsurance.co.nz
- rentalinsurance.co.nz
- loaninsurance.co.nz
- yachtinsurance.co.nz
- buildingsinsurance.co.nz
- publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz
- cover4you.co.nz (portfolio brochure site)

We are a free comparison service. We do not provide insurance or act as brokers. All insurance products are provided by licensed NZ insurers and intermediaries.
